message:
fix: properly switch CDP session when changing tabs

When switching tabs, the old code would try to attach to the new target
but fail if already attached. This left the old session_id in use,
causing screencast to continue showing the old tab.

Fix:
- Detach from current session before attaching to new target
- Stop screencast before switching targets
- Require successful attach (no silent fallback to old session)
- This ensures screencast always starts on the correct session
